relevant_entries.role: Builds JSON body and POSTs to CorpServices.asmx/BusinessNameSearch.
Binds Details button in business-name result grid to ShowBusinessDetails.
Builds ViewXSLTFileByName.aspx?providerName=MSBSD_CorporationBusinessDetails&FilingId=<filingId> and loads the detail modal.

chain: source search page -> BusinessNameSearch -> BusinessNameSearch ASMX -> Kendo grid row FilingId -> ShowBusinessDetails -> showModalBusinessDetails -> detail XHR

role: Akamai Bot Manager style sensor script loaded from same-origin randomized path; paired with POST to the same path and bm_s cookie refresh.
Not the real JS; this is an anonymous curl 403 Access Denied sample showing Akamai edge blocking.
